title: The Crew Rides Into the Deep
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Fish-Men, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. The core story beat is the crew rides into the deep.
scene: The scene centers on the crew rides into the deep, with Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Fish-Men, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Elephant Gun!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember if you want to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He sent it flying!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just how strong has he got?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aun! There's something down there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shark?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A Mark on

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haaa.. Haa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a pretty big shark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that shark... wearing clothes?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahhh H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They're all being sucked into the downward current!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crap!! After them!! If they're going down, so are we!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaa ghhh! uhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nghhh HH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep the yard straight!! Turn the ship left!! We're going to collide with the continental shelf!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hnghh!! Here goes nothing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hang on tight, everyone!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're not careful, the whole ship could end up destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaa Aaa?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't get shaken off the ship, now!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Keep to the very centre of the current!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This speed is crazy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: have been a little more helpful than the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: urghh 4hh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aah 44h...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: USOP!...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Owwww...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Whew... looks like we're... alive, at least...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, guys, why the dead silence?! Honestly, you are all hopeless without me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH - WHOA!!..IT SURE IS COLD DOWN HERE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Still, I don't know how we're going to search for anything in this pitch-black darkness...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't handle dark places! Don't you feel like there's something watching you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We must be about 7000 metres down by now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this depth, even the shark submerge would be crushed flat by the pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Are we getting close to fishman Island?! Maybe the others have found it already...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm pretty sure keimi- chan said... it's 1000 meters deep...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So there's still 3000 metres to go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't seem to find Luffy and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It looks like we've lost them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just hope they haven't been torn to pieces by sea monsters...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't imagine such scary things!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where have they gone off to in those tiny bubbles?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this is why I told them to use the lifelines...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even if they are alive, their air won't last... it's just too dange- rous!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, no point standing around whining about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's search for them!! I have a light function built-in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! do your eyes light up?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Franky...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NIPPLE LIGHT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of place for a light is that?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These are the deepwater levels. Where the light cannot reach, and ordinary creatures cannot hope to survive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A true ocean "under- world".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaA SHI!!!!

summary: The Crew Rides Into the Deep. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
